# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
  - type: 'Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses'
    name: '[concat(variables(''vmNamePrefix''), ''-pip-'', copyIndex())]'
    apiVersion: '2020-12-01'
    location: '[variables(''location'')]'
    properties: 
      publicIPAllocationMethod: 'Dynamic'
  
  - type: 'Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines'
    name: '[concat(variables(''vmNamePrefix''), copyIndex())]'
    apiVersion: '2020-12-01'
    location: '[variables(''location'')]'
    dependsOn: [
      '[resourceId(''Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses'',concat(variables(''vmNamePrefix''), ''-pip-'', copyIndex()))]'
    ]
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: '[variables(''vmSize'')]'
      storageProfile:
        osDisk:
          createOption: 'FromImage'
          name: '[concat(variables(''vmNamePrefix''), copyIndex(), ''-osdisk'')]'
        imageReference:
          publisher: '[variables(''imagePublisher'')]'
          offer: '[variables(''imageOffer'')]'
          sku: '[variables(''imageSku'')]'
          version: 'latest'
      osProfile:
        computerName: '[concat(variables(''vmNamePrefix''), copyIndex())]'
        adminUsername: '[parameters(''adminUsername'')]'
        adminPassword: '[parameters(''adminPassword'')]'
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces: [
          {
            id: '[resourceId(''Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces'', concat(variables(''vmNamePrefix''), copyIndex()))]'
          }
        ]
      diagnosticsProfile:
        bootDiagnostics:
          enabled: 'true'
          storageUri: '[concat(variables(''storageAccountResourceId''), ''/blobServices/default/containers/bootdiagnosticscontainer'')]'

  - type: 'Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/extensions'
    name: '[concat(variables(''vmNamePrefix''), copyIndex(), ''/VmExtension'')]'
    apiVersion: '2020-12-01'
    location: '[variables(''location'')]'
    dependsOn: [
      '[concat(''Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines'', variables(''location''), concat(variables(''vmNamePrefix''), copyIndex()))]'
    ]
    properties:
      publisher: 'Microsoft.Compute'
      type: 'CustomScriptExtension'
      typeHandlerVersion: '1.10'
      settings: 
        fileUris: []
        commandToExecute: '[parameters(''customScriptCommandToExecute'')]'
